created_by.description: Information about the creator of the model.

heap_size.description: The estimated heap size to keep the model in memory.

operations.description:
The estimated number of operations to use the model.
This number helps to measure the computational complexity of the model.

license.description: The license level of the model.

create_time.description: The time the model was created.

version.description: The version of Elasticsearch when the model was created.

ingest.pipelines.description: The number of pipelines that are referencing the model.

ingest.count.description: The total number of documents that are processed by the model.

ingest.time.description: The total time spent processing documents with thie model.

ingest.current.description: The total number of documents that are currently being handled by the model.

ingest.failed.description: The total number of failed ingest attempts with the model.

data_frame.id.description:
The identifier for the data frame analytics job that created the model.
Only displayed if the job is still available.

data_frame.create_time.description: The time the data frame analytics job was created.

data_frame.source_index.description: The source index used to train in the data frame analysis.

data_frame.analysis.description: The analysis used by the data frame to build the model.
